message:
feat: implement BZPOPMIN/BZPOPMAX/BZMPOP, overhaul Pub/Sub message model, and fix multi-channel subscribe replies

Add blocking sorted set pop commands (BZPOPMIN, BZPOPMAX, BZMPOP) with
full argument parsing, ACL category registration, and command table
entries including shared parse_blocking_timeout helper.

Rewrite Pub/Sub internals: introduce PubSubMessage enum replacing raw
tuples, fix publish() to emit separate pmessage per matching pattern
(was breaking after first match), and rewrite SUBSCRIBE/UNSUBSCRIBE/
PSUBSCRIBE/PUNSUBSCRIBE to produce per-channel reply arrays matching
Redis wire protocol. Fix PUBSUB CHANNELS to use proper glob_match()
instead of broken substring containment check.

Add core_pubsub.json conformance fixture and corresponding smoke test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
